title: Tune the scrape config
description: Align scrape interval, timeout, and relabeling with metric freshness and cardinality goals.
body: Steps: 1. List each target's freshness need and metric volume. 2. Set the scrape interval to balance resolution against load. 3. Ensure the scrape timeout is below the interval. 4. Apply relabel_configs to keep only needed targets and metric_relabel_configs to drop noisy labels. 5. Verify samples arrive at the expected interval without timeouts. Rollback point: before applying new scrape settings to all targets. Validation: targets report up, samples land on schedule, and dropped labels are gone.
